faqs.question: What are your hours of operation?
faqs.answer: Our shop hours vary by day. Please call us or check our website for our current schedule and drop-off availability.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer full automotive services including oil changes, brake repair, engine diagnostics, tire services, AC repair, and more. Contact us with your vehicle's needs.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide estimates before beginning work. Bring your vehicle in for a diagnosis and we'll give you an honest assessment.

faqs.question: How do I schedule an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can schedule by calling our shop or requesting an appointment online. We also accept drop-offs and walk-ins based on availability.

faqs.question: What makes and models do you work on?
faqs.answer: We service most makes and models of cars and light trucks. Contact us to confirm we can work on your specific vehicle.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we warranty our parts and labor. Ask us about warranty details for your specific repair when you bring in your vehicle.

faqs.question: How long will my repair take?
faqs.answer: Repair time depends on the work needed. We'll give you an estimated completion time and keep you updated throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you offer loaner cars or shuttle service?
faqs.answer: Transportation options vary by shop. Please ask us about loaner vehicles or local shuttle service when you schedule your appointment.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept most major credit cards, debit cards, and cash. We may also offer financing for larger repairs.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: Please visit our website or call for our address and directions. We have customer parking available.

faqs.question: Can you help with state inspections?
faqs.answer: Inspection services vary by location and state requirements. Contact us to confirm if we perform inspections and what documentation you need.

faqs.question: Do you use quality parts?
faqs.answer: We use quality OEM and aftermarket parts. We'll discuss part options with you so you can make the best choice for your budget and vehicle.
